scripts.dev: echo '▶ Headless: backend API + Vite dev server (no Electron)' && pnpm dev:kill && turbo run dev --filter=backend --filter=frontend
scripts.dev:all: echo '▶ Full GUI: Vite + Electron (backend spawned by Electron)' && pnpm dev:kill && pnpm --filter frontend build && concurrently -k -n vite,electron "pnpm --filter frontend dev" "wait-on tcp:5173 && pnpm --filter gui dev"
